meta.source: Seeded from mbzuai-oryx/Awesome-LLM-Post-training and canonical literature; auto-updated daily via arXiv crawler.

papers.title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners (FLAN)

summary.en: Introduces instruction tuning: finetuning on many tasks phrased as instructions dramatically improves zero-shot generalization.
summary.zh: 提出指令微调:在大量以指令形式表述的任务上微调,可显著提升零样本泛化能力。

papers.title: Scaling Instruction-Finetuned Language Models (Flan-T5)

summary.en: Scales instruction finetuning to 1.8K tasks and shows gains across model sizes, including chain-of-thought data.
summary.zh: 将指令微调扩展到 1800 个任务,并证明在各种规模模型上均有提升,还纳入了思维链数据。

papers.title: Training language models to follow instructions with human feedback (InstructGPT)

summary.en: The InstructGPT paper: combines supervised instruction tuning with RLHF to align models with user intent.
summary.zh: InstructGPT 论文:将监督指令微调与 RLHF 结合,使模型与用户意图对齐。

papers.title: WizardLM: Empowering Large Language Models to Follow Complex Instructions (Evol-Instruct)

summary.en: Introduces Evol-Instruct to automatically evolve instructions into more complex ones for stronger instruction following.
summary.zh: 提出 Evol-Instruct,自动将指令演化为更复杂的版本,以增强指令遵循能力。

papers.title: LIMA: Less Is More for Alignment

summary.en: Shows that just 1,000 carefully curated examples can align a strong pretrained model, suggesting alignment is mostly format learning.
summary.zh: 证明仅用 1000 条精心挑选的样本即可对齐强预训练模型,暗示对齐主要是学习格式。

papers.title: LoRA: Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Language Models

summary.en: Freezes pretrained weights and injects trainable low-rank matrices, drastically cutting fine-tuning cost.
summary.zh: 冻结预训练权重并注入可训练的低秩矩阵,大幅降低微调成本。

papers.title: QLoRA: Efficient Finetuning of Quantized LLMs

summary.en: Back-propagates through 4-bit quantized weights into LoRA adapters, enabling fine-tuning of huge models on one GPU.
summary.zh: 在 4-bit 量化权重上反向传播到 LoRA 适配器,使超大模型可在单张 GPU 上微调。

papers.title: Prefix-Tuning: Optimizing Continuous Prompts for Generation

summary.en: Keeps the model frozen and learns a small continuous task-specific prefix, a foundational PEFT method.
summary.zh: 冻结模型,仅学习一个小的连续任务前缀,是参数高效微调的奠基方法之一。

papers.title: The Power of Scale for Parameter-Efficient Prompt Tuning

summary.en: Learns soft prompts only; shows prompt tuning matches full fine-tuning as model scale grows.
summary.zh: 只学习软提示;证明随着模型规模增大,提示微调可媲美全量微调。

papers.title: DoRA: Weight-Decomposed Low-Rank Adaptation

summary.en: Decomposes weights into magnitude and direction, improving LoRA's learning capacity with no extra inference cost.
summary.zh: 将权重分解为幅度与方向,在不增加推理成本的情况下提升 LoRA 的学习能力。

papers.title: Self-Instruct: Aligning Language Models with Self-Generated Instructions

summary.en: Bootstraps an instruction dataset from a model's own generations, reducing reliance on human-written data.
summary.zh: 利用模型自身生成来自举指令数据集,降低对人工编写数据的依赖。

papers.title: Orca: Progressive Learning from Complex Explanation Traces of GPT-4

summary.en: Trains smaller models on rich explanation traces from GPT-4, teaching reasoning process rather than just answers.
summary.zh: 用 GPT-4 的丰富解释轨迹训练小模型,教会其推理过程而非仅仅答案。

papers.title: Self-Alignment with Instruction Backtranslation

summary.en: Generates instructions for unlabeled web text (backtranslation) and self-curates high-quality pairs for tuning.
summary.zh: 为无标注网页文本反向生成指令(回译),并自我筛选高质量样本对用于微调。

papers.title: What Makes Good Data for Alignment? A Comprehensive Study (DEITA)

summary.en: Studies complexity, quality, and diversity of alignment data, and proposes automatic data selection (DEITA).
summary.zh: 研究对齐数据的复杂度、质量与多样性,并提出自动数据筛选方法 DEITA。

papers.title: STaR: Bootstrapping Reasoning with Reasoning

summary.en: Iteratively fine-tunes a model on its own correct rationales, bootstrapping reasoning from a small seed set.
summary.zh: 在模型自身生成的正确推理过程上迭代微调,从少量种子样本自举推理能力。

papers.title: Distilling System 2 into System 1

summary.en: Distills deliberate System 2 reasoning into faster System 1 responses, cutting inference cost while keeping quality.
summary.zh: 将审慎的 System 2 推理蒸馏为更快的 System 1 响应,降低推理成本同时保持质量。

papers.title: Knowledge Distillation of Large Language Models (MiniLLM)

summary.en: Proposes reverse-KL distillation better suited to generative LLMs, avoiding overestimation of low-probability regions.
summary.zh: 提出更适合生成式 LLM 的反向 KL 蒸馏,避免对低概率区域的高估。

papers.title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning Capability in LLMs via Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Shows large-scale RL with verifiable rewards alone can incentivize strong reasoning, with distillation to smaller models.
summary.zh: 证明仅用可验证奖励的大规模 RL 即可激发强推理能力,并可蒸馏到小模型。

papers.title: DeepSeekMath: Pushing the Limits of Mathematical Reasoning in Open Language Models

summary.en: Introduces GRPO (Group Relative Policy Optimization), removing the value model for efficient RL on math reasoning.
summary.zh: 提出 GRPO(组相对策略优化),去掉价值模型,实现数学推理上的高效 RL。

papers.title: Kimi k1.5: Scaling Reinforcement Learning with LLMs

summary.en: Scales RL with long-context and multimodal reasoning, with techniques for long-to-short CoT, to reach frontier performance.
summary.zh: 通过长上下文与多模态推理扩展 RL,并用长到短思维链等技术达到前沿性能。

papers.title: Understanding R1-Zero-Like Training: A Critical Perspective

summary.en: Analyzes R1-Zero-style RL, identifies bias in GRPO's optimization, and proposes Dr. GRPO to fix it.
summary.zh: 剖析 R1-Zero 式 RL,指出 GRPO 优化中的偏差,并提出 Dr. GRPO 加以修正。

papers.title: Does Reinforcement Learning Really Incentivize Reasoning Capacity Beyond the Base Model?

summary.en: Questions whether RLVR adds new reasoning ability or mainly sharpens sampling of what the base model already knows.
summary.zh: 质疑 RLVR 究竟是带来新的推理能力,还是主要在强化基座模型已有知识的采样。

papers.title: Direct Preference Optimization: Your Language Model is Secretly a Reward Model

summary.en: Introduces DPO, optimizing preferences directly with a classification loss, no separate reward model or RL loop.
summary.zh: 提出 DPO,用分类损失直接优化偏好,无需单独的奖励模型与 RL 循环。

papers.title: A General Theoretical Paradigm to Understand Learning from Human Preferences (IPO)

summary.en: Proposes IPO, a theoretically grounded objective avoiding the overfitting DPO suffers when preferences are near-deterministic.
summary.zh: 提出 IPO,一种有理论支撑的目标,避免偏好接近确定时 DPO 的过拟合。

papers.title: KTO: Model Alignment as Prospect Theoretic Optimization

summary.en: Aligns models using only per-output binary good/bad signals, drawing on prospect theory; no paired preferences needed.
summary.zh: 基于前景理论,仅用每条输出的好/坏二元信号对齐,无需成对偏好数据。

papers.title: SimPO: Simple Preference Optimization with a Reference-Free Reward

summary.en: Uses average log-probability as an implicit reward, eliminating the reference model DPO requires.
summary.zh: 用平均对数概率作为隐式奖励,去除 DPO 所需的参考模型。

papers.title: ORPO: Monolithic Preference Optimization without Reference Model

summary.en: Merges SFT and preference alignment into one stage with an odds-ratio penalty, needing no reference model.
summary.zh: 用几率比惩罚将 SFT 与偏好对齐合并为单一阶段,无需参考模型。

papers.title: Step-DPO: Step-wise Preference Optimization for Long-chain Reasoning

summary.en: Extends DPO to individual reasoning steps for improved long-chain reasoning.
summary.zh: 将 DPO 扩展到单个推理步骤,以提升长链条推理能力。

papers.title: Learning to Summarize from Human Feedback

summary.en: An early demonstration that reward modeling on human comparisons plus PPO beats supervised summarization.
summary.zh: 早期工作,证明在人类比较上做奖励建模再用 PPO,效果优于监督式摘要。

papers.title: Training a Helpful and Harmless Assistant with RLHF

summary.en: Anthropic's study of RLHF for helpfulness and harmlessness, covering preference data and reward model scaling.
summary.zh: Anthropic 关于以有用性与无害性为目标的 RLHF 研究,涵盖偏好数据与奖励模型扩展。

papers.title: Back to Basics: Revisiting REINFORCE-Style Optimization for RLHF (RLOO)

summary.en: Shows a simpler REINFORCE-style estimator (RLOO) can match or beat PPO for RLHF at lower cost.
summary.zh: 证明更简单的 REINFORCE 式估计器(RLOO)在 RLHF 中能以更低成本媲美甚至超过 PPO。

papers.title: Secrets of RLHF in Large Language Models Part I: PPO

summary.en: A detailed practical study of stabilizing PPO for RLHF, including reward normalization and clipping tricks.
summary.zh: 关于稳定 RLHF 中 PPO 训练的详尽实践研究,含奖励归一化与裁剪技巧。

papers.title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback

summary.en: Replaces human harmlessness labels with AI feedback guided by a set of principles (a 'constitution'), enabling RLAIF.
summary.zh: 用受一组原则(“宪法”)引导的 AI 反馈替代人工无害性标注,实现 RLAIF。

papers.title: RLAIF: Scaling Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback with AI Feedback

summary.en: Shows RL from AI feedback can match RLHF, and studies direct vs. distilled AI preference labeling.
summary.zh: 证明基于 AI 反馈的 RL 可媲美 RLHF,并研究直接与蒸馏式 AI 偏好标注。

papers.title: Self-Rewarding Language Models

summary.en: Uses the model itself as an LLM-as-judge to generate its own rewards, iteratively improving via DPO.
summary.zh: 让模型自身作为裁判生成奖励,并通过 DPO 迭代自我提升。

papers.title: Let's Verify Step by Step

summary.en: Demonstrates process supervision (rewarding each step) outperforms outcome supervision for math reasoning.
summary.zh: 证明过程监督(对每一步给予奖励)在数学推理上优于结果监督。

papers.title: Math-Shepherd: Verify and Reinforce LLMs Step-by-step without Human Annotations

summary.en: Builds a process reward model with automatically labeled step correctness, no human annotation needed.
summary.zh: 用自动标注的步骤正确性构建过程奖励模型,无需人工标注。

papers.title: RewardBench: Evaluating Reward Models for Language Modeling

summary.en: The first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating reward models across chat, reasoning, and safety.
summary.zh: 首个全面评测奖励模型的基准,覆盖对话、推理与安全等维度。

papers.title: Solving Math Word Problems with Process- and Outcome-Based Feedback

summary.en: An early comparison of process vs. outcome supervision for training verifiers on math problems.
summary.zh: 早期工作,比较过程监督与结果监督在数学题验证器训练中的效果。

papers.title: Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models

summary.en: Shows that prompting for intermediate reasoning steps unlocks strong performance on complex reasoning tasks.
summary.zh: 证明引导模型输出中间推理步骤可在复杂推理任务上释放强大性能。

papers.title: Self-Consistency Improves Chain of Thought Reasoning in Language Models

summary.en: Samples multiple reasoning paths and majority-votes over answers, substantially improving CoT accuracy.
summary.zh: 采样多条推理路径并对答案取多数投票,显著提升思维链准确率。

papers.title: Scaling LLM Test-Time Compute Optimally can be More Effective than Scaling Parameters

summary.en: Shows optimally allocating inference-time compute can beat simply using a larger model.
summary.zh: 证明在最优分配下,增加推理时算力可胜过单纯使用更大的模型。

papers.title: s1: Simple Test-Time Scaling

summary.en: Achieves strong reasoning with only 1K curated examples plus 'budget forcing' to control test-time thinking length.
summary.zh: 仅用 1000 条精选样本加“预算强制”控制推理长度,即获得强推理能力。

papers.title: Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models

summary.en: Generalizes chain-of-thought into a search over a tree of intermediate thoughts with lookahead and backtracking.
summary.zh: 将思维链推广为在思维树上的搜索,支持前瞻与回溯。

papers.title: rStar-Math: Small LLMs Can Master Math Reasoning with Self-Evolved Deep Thinking

summary.en: Uses MCTS-driven self-evolution to let small models reach strong math reasoning without distillation from larger ones.
summary.zh: 借助 MCTS 驱动的自我进化,让小模型无需从大模型蒸馏即可获得强数学推理能力。

papers.title: ReST-MCTS*: LLM Self-Training via Process Reward Guided Tree Search

summary.en: Combines MCTS with a process reward model to collect high-quality traces for self-training.
summary.zh: 将 MCTS 与过程奖励模型结合,采集高质量轨迹用于自训练。

papers.title: A Survey on Post-training of Large Language Models

summary.en: A comprehensive survey organizing LLM post-training across fine-tuning, RLHF, and reasoning enhancement.
summary.zh: 系统梳理 LLM 后训练全景的综述,涵盖微调、RLHF 与推理增强。

papers.title: LLM Post-Training: A Deep Dive into Reasoning Large Language Models

summary.en: The foundational survey behind this list, taxonomizing post-training into fine-tuning, RL, and test-time scaling.
summary.zh: 本列表所依据的基础综述,将后训练划分为微调、强化学习与测试时扩展。

papers.title: From System 1 to System 2: A Survey of Reasoning Large Language Models

summary.en: Surveys the transition from fast intuitive (System 1) to deliberate (System 2) reasoning in LLMs.
summary.zh: 综述 LLM 从快速直觉 (System 1) 到审慎推理 (System 2) 的演进。

papers.title: Training Verifiers to Solve Math Word Problems (GSM8K)

summary.en: Introduces the GSM8K grade-school math benchmark and shows verifiers can rerank solutions for big accuracy gains.
summary.zh: 提出 GSM8K 小学数学基准,并证明验证器可对候选解重排以大幅提升准确率。

papers.title: Measuring Mathematical Problem Solving With the MATH Dataset

summary.en: Introduces the challenging MATH dataset of competition problems, a standard reasoning benchmark.
summary.zh: 提出高难度的 MATH 竞赛题数据集,成为标准推理基准。

papers.title: Humanity's Last Exam

summary.en: A frontier benchmark of extremely difficult expert-level questions designed to resist saturation.
summary.zh: 由极难的专家级题目组成的前沿基准,旨在抵抗性能饱和。

papers.title: MMLU: Measuring Massive Multitask Language Understanding

summary.en: A 57-subject knowledge and reasoning benchmark widely used to compare LLM capabilities.
summary.zh: 涵盖 57 个学科的知识与推理基准,广泛用于比较 LLM 能力。

papers.title: Safety Tax: Safety Alignment Makes Your Large Reasoning Models Less Reasonable

summary.en: Investigates the trade-off where safety alignment can degrade the reasoning ability of large reasoning models.
summary.zh: 研究安全对齐可能削弱大型推理模型推理能力的权衡关系。

papers.title: GuardReasoner: Towards Reasoning-based LLM Safeguards

summary.en: Proposes reasoning-based guardrails improving interpretability and robustness of LLM safety moderation.
summary.zh: 提出基于推理的护栏机制,提升 LLM 安全审核的可解释性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Universal and Transferable Adversarial Attacks on Aligned Language Models (GCG)

summary.en: Shows automated adversarial suffixes can jailbreak aligned models and transfer across them, exposing alignment fragility.
summary.zh: 证明自动生成的对抗后缀可越狱对齐模型并跨模型迁移,暴露对齐的脆弱性。

papers.title: TRL: Transformer Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Hugging Face's library for post-training transformers with SFT, reward modeling, PPO, DPO, and GRPO.
summary.zh: Hugging Face 的后训练库,支持 SFT、奖励建模、PPO、DPO 与 GRPO。

papers.title: OpenRLHF: An Easy-to-use, Scalable and High-performance RLHF Framework

summary.en: A scalable RLHF framework built on Ray, vLLM, and DeepSpeed for training large models with PPO and related algorithms.
summary.zh: 基于 Ray、vLLM 与 DeepSpeed 的可扩展 RLHF 框架,用 PPO 等算法训练大模型。

papers.title: verl: Volcano Engine Reinforcement Learning for LLMs

summary.en: A flexible, efficient RL training library for LLMs implementing the HybridFlow programming model.
summary.zh: 面向 LLM 的灵活高效 RL 训练库,实现了 HybridFlow 编程模型。

papers.title: LLaMA-Factory: Unified Efficient Fine-Tuning of 100+ Language Models

summary.en: A unified framework for SFT, PEFT, and preference optimization across a wide range of open models.
summary.zh: 统一的微调框架,支持在众多开源模型上做 SFT、PEFT 与偏好优化。

papers.title: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation

summary.en: Transfers RL policy shifts from weaker models to stronger ones via implicit reward signals without explicit reward modeling.
summary.zh: 通过隐式奖励信号将弱模型的强化学习策略转移到强模型，无需显式奖励建模。

papers.title: dOPSD: On-Policy Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models

summary.en: On-policy self-distillation for diffusion LLMs using the model's own denoising trajectory as privileged information for token-level supervision.
summary.zh: 使用模型自身的去噪轨迹作为特权信息的扩散语言模型在线自蒸馏方法，提供令牌级监督。

papers.title: SCOReD: Student-Aware CoT Optimization for Recommendation Distillation

summary.en: Optimizes teacher CoT traces for student distillation in recommendations by parsing, scoring, and editing segments to improve learning signal.
summary.zh: 通过解析、评分和编辑推理段落来优化教师CoT轨迹，用于推荐域中的学生蒸馏，改进学习信号。

papers.title: Self-Review Reinforcement Learning (SRRL) with Cross-Episode Memory and Policy Distillation

summary.en: Embeds self-review into RL episodes with cross-episode memory and policy distillation to improve learning from sparse feedback.
summary.zh: 在RL回合中嵌入自评步骤，结合跨回合记忆和策略蒸馏以改进稀疏反馈学习。

papers.title: TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine

summary.en: TREK combines distillation for exploration with GRPO refinement to improve reasoning on hard prompts using verified teacher trajectories.
summary.zh: TREK结合蒸馏探索和GRPO优化，利用验证的教师轨迹改进困难问题的推理能力。

papers.title: CurateEvo: Data-Curation Evolving for Agentic Post-Training

summary.en: Dynamic data curation framework that evolves filtering and augmentation strategies using failed trajectories to improve agentic post-training.
summary.zh: 动态数据策展框架，利用失败轨迹进化筛选和增强策略以改进智能体后训练。

papers.title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework

summary.en: A probabilistic verification framework using LLM token logits to generate continuous scores for solution evaluation and RL training.
summary.zh: 一个使用LLM token logits生成连续分数的概率验证框架，用于解决方案评估和RL训练。

papers.title: MentalThink: Shaping Thoughts in Mental SVG World

summary.en: MLLMs learn to generate and iteratively refine SVG code as an executable intermediate representation for visual-spatial reasoning and scene understanding.
summary.zh: 多模态大模型学习生成和迭代改进SVG代码作为可执行的中间表示，用于视觉空间推理和场景理解。

papers.title: DT-Guard: Intent-Driven Reasoning-Active Training for Reasoning-Free LLM Safety Guardrail

summary.en: Reasoning-supervised safety guardrail that internalizes reasoning during training to maintain inference efficiency while improving robustness.
summary.zh: 一种推理监督的安全守卫模型，在训练中内化推理以保持推理效率并提高鲁棒性。

papers.title: Strategic Bargaining in Multi-Buyer Markets: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards for LLM Negotiations

summary.en: Uses RLVF with verifiable economic rewards to train LLMs for strategic multi-buyer negotiation, learning market exploration and surplus extraction.
summary.zh: 使用可验证经济奖励的RLVR训练LLM进行多买家谈判，学习市场探索和剩余价值提取。

papers.title: Mitigating Factual Hallucination in Large Reasoning Models via Mixed-Mode Advantage Regularization

summary.en: RL framework using non-thinking rollouts as references to mitigate factual hallucination in reasoning models via advantage regularization.
summary.zh: 使用非推理轨迹作为参考的强化学习框架，通过优势正则化缓解推理模型中的事实幻觉。

papers.title: Bridging Interleaved Multi-Modal Reasoning as a Unified Decision Process

summary.en: Unified RL framework for multi-modal reasoning that jointly optimizes text and image generation through shared trajectory advantages and VLM-based reward signals.
summary.zh: 统一的多模态推理RL框架，通过共享轨迹优势和基于VLM的奖励信号联合优化文本和图像生成。

papers.title: TurnOPD: Making On-Policy Distillation Turn-Aware for Efficient Long-Horizon Agent Training

summary.en: Efficient on-policy distillation for long-horizon agents via turn-level budgeting and adaptive rollout depth control.
summary.zh: 通过转轮级预算和自适应回滚深度控制实现长视界代理的高效在线蒸馏。

papers.title: Is One Layer Enough? Training A Single Transformer Layer Can Match Full-Parameter RL Training

summary.en: Shows that RL gains concentrate in middle transformer layers; training a single layer can match full-parameter RL performance across GRPO and variants.
summary.zh: 发现RL收益集中在中间变换器层；训练单层可匹配全参数RL性能，覆盖GRPO等多种算法。

papers.title: Demonstrating TOFFEE: A Learned System for Synthesizing Data Agent Trajectories at Scale

summary.en: TOFFEE synthesizes high-quality data agent trajectories via MCTS for SFT and in-context learning in data environments.
summary.zh: TOFFEE通过MCTS为数据代理合成高质量轨迹，用于SFT和上下文学习。

papers.title: LongCrafter: Towards Diverse Long-Context Understanding via Evidence-Graph-Guided Instruction Synthesis

summary.en: Synthesizes diverse long-context SFT data using hierarchical task taxonomy and evidence graphs to improve LLM long-context understanding.
summary.zh: 使用分层任务分类和证据图谱合成多样化长文本SFT数据，以改进LLM长文本理解能力。

papers.title: SearchEyes: Towards Frontier Multimodal Deep Search Intelligence via Search World Simulation

summary.en: Unified search world simulation with step-level reward anchors for multimodal agent training via hop-level credit assignment.
summary.zh: 通过跳级信用分配，使用步级奖励锚的统一搜索世界模拟来训练多模态智能体。

papers.title: When Should LLMs Search? Counterfactual Supervision for Search Routing

summary.en: Trains routing policies to decide when to use search via counterfactual supervision and preference optimization, improving search efficiency.
summary.zh: 通过反事实监督和偏好优化训练路由策略，决定何时使用搜索，提高搜索效率。

papers.title: Geometric Self-Distillation for Reasoning Generalization

summary.en: Geometric self-distillation method that prevents student drift during on-policy distillation via Hellinger loss and proximal Fisher-Rao regularization.
summary.zh: 几何自蒸馏方法通过Hellinger损失和近似Fisher-Rao正则化防止在线蒸馏中学生模型漂移。

papers.title: RL Post-Training Builds Compositional Reasoning Strategies

summary.en: RL post-training composes primitive skills into higher-level strategies through phased discovery of sequential and parallel reductions.
summary.zh: RL后训练通过分阶段发现顺序和并行化简，将原始技能组合成更高层次的策略。

papers.title: Online Data Selection Is Implicit Alignment

summary.en: Shows online data selection during SFT implicitly shapes model alignment; proposes Alignment Drift Auditing and alignment-aware selection.
summary.zh: 揭示SFT期间的在线数据选择隐含地塑造模型对齐；提出对齐漂移审计和对齐感知选择方法。

papers.title: Cost-Effective Agent Harnesses for Abstract Reasoning and Generalization on ARC-AGI-1

summary.en: Agentic harnesses for abstract reasoning via structured pattern discovery and program synthesis with adaptive re-exploration.
summary.zh: 通过结构化模式发现和程序合成以及自适应重新探索的代理框架用于抽象推理。

papers.title: Agon: Competitive Cross-Model RL with Implicit Rival Grading of Reasoning

summary.en: Competitive cross-model RL where models grade each other's reasoning implicitly, doubling GRPO performance on hard math problems.
summary.zh: 竞争性跨模型强化学习，模型相互评分推理过程，在困难数学问题上性能翻倍。

papers.title: Max Out GRPO Signal: Adaptive Trace Prefix Control for Hard Reasoning Problems

summary.en: Adaptive prefix control for GRPO that maintains ~50% success rate during training, doubling accuracy on hard reasoning problems.
summary.zh: 自适应前缀控制方法，通过在GRPO训练中保持约50%的成功率，在困难推理问题上实现精度翻倍。

papers.title: Recursive Self-Improvement in AI: From Bounded Self-Refinement to Autonomous Research Loops

summary.en: Comprehensive survey of 1,250 papers on recursive self-improvement in AI systems, taxonomizing improvement loops and self-evaluation mechanisms.
summary.zh: 对1,250篇论文的综合综述,涵盖AI系统的递归自我改进、改进循环分类和自我评估机制。

papers.title: Search, Fail, Recover: A Training Framework for Correction-Aware Reasoning

summary.en: Training framework teaching models to recover from failed reasoning branches via supervised search over partial solution chains with backtracking.
summary.zh: 通过在部分解链上的监督搜索和回溯，训练模型从失败的推理分支中恢复的框架。

papers.title: UP: Unbounded Positive Asymmetric Optimization for Breaking the Exploration-Stability Dilemma

summary.en: UP objective breaks exploration-stability dilemma in RL by using asymmetric clipping for positive/negative advantages across token and sequence-level frameworks.
summary.zh: UP目标通过在token和序列级框架中对正负优势使用非对称裁剪，打破RL中的探索-稳定性困境。

papers.title: When Does In-Context Search Help? A Sampling-Complexity Theory of Reflection-Driven Reasoning

summary.en: Theoretical analysis of in-context search complexity for iterative refinement, showing exponential improvements when reflections reliably localize early mistakes.
summary.zh: 对迭代精化的上下文搜索复杂度进行理论分析，证明当反思可靠定位早期错误时能获得指数级改进。

papers.title: Large Behavior Model: A Promptable Digital Twin of the Retail Customer

summary.en: LBM learns customer behavior from retail transactions via continued pre-training, SFT, and RL with verifiable rewards for behavioral grounding.
summary.zh: LBM通过持续预训练、有监督微调和可验证奖励RL从零售交易数据中学习客户行为。

papers.title: MILES: Modular Instruction Memory with Learnable Selection for Self-Improving LLM Reasoning

summary.en: Memory-augmented framework with learnable selection heads for test-time reasoning improvement via modular instruction retrieval.
summary.zh: 具有可学习选择头的内存增强框架，通过模块化指令检索改进测试时推理。

papers.title: DiaLLM: An Investigation into the Robustness-Generation Gap in English Dialect Adaptation

summary.en: Studies post-training methods for dialectal English generation, revealing misalignment between reward optimization and human preference in dialect adaptation.
summary.zh: 研究方言英语生成的后训练方法，揭示方言适配中奖励优化与人类偏好的不一致。

papers.title: Future Confidence Distillation in Large Language Models

summary.en: Distills post-solution confidence signals into pre-solution hidden representations for efficient, calibrated confidence estimation without inference overhead.
summary.zh: 将后生成置信度信号蒸馏到前置隐藏表示中，实现高效且精准的置信度估计，无推理开销。

papers.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Asynchronous RL method for LLM post-training using single-rollout sampling and token-level clipping to improve stability and performance on agentic tasks.
summary.zh: 用单次采样和token级别裁剪改进异步强化学习稳定性，用于LLM后训练的智能体任务。

papers.title: Entropy Pacing Policy Optimization for Multi-Task Agentic Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Proposes EPPO, an entropy-aware policy optimization method for multi-task agentic LLM RL that coordinates exploration-exploitation across tasks.
summary.zh: 提出EPPO方法，通过任务感知的熵调节机制协调多任务智能体LLM强化学习中的探索-利用平衡。

papers.title: Behavior Leverage Imbalance in Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation

summary.en: Identifies behavior leverage imbalance in multi-teacher on-policy distillation for tool-use models and proposes Soft Clamp to calibrate token-level divergence.
summary.zh: 识别多教师在线蒸馏中的行为杠杆失衡问题，提出Soft Clamp方法校准令牌级散度。

papers.title: Towards Mechanistically Understanding Why Memorized Knowledge Fails to Generalize in Large Language Model Finetuning

summary.en: Identifies why fine-tuned knowledge fails to generalize via knowledge-circuit misalignment; proposes self-patching intervention to improve generalization.
summary.zh: 通过知识电路错位假设解释微调知识泛化失败，提出自我补丁干预方法改进泛化性能。

papers.title: Different Teachers, Different Capabilities: Sub-1B On-Device Distillation for Structured Text Enrichment

summary.en: Distills reasoning teacher (DeepSeek-R1 8B) into 0.6B student via QLoRA, analyzing capability transfer across subtasks with per-field routing.
summary.zh: 通过QLoRA将推理教师（DeepSeek-R1 8B）蒸馏为0.6B学生，分析不同子任务的能力转移并提供按字段路由方案。

papers.title: Towards Precision Therapy in Hepatocellular Carcinoma: A Clinical-Reasoning LLM for Risk Stratification and Treatment Guidance

summary.en: Clinical LLM optimized with step-verifiable composite rewards for HCC risk stratification and treatment guidance.
summary.zh: 使用可验证的复合奖励优化的临床LLM，用于肝细胞癌风险分层和治疗指导。

papers.title: Compete Then Collaborate: Frontier AI Teachers Build a Verifiable Curriculum to Improve a Coding Student Beyond Imitation

summary.en: Multi-teacher curriculum via execution-based ranking improves student coding models through RLVR rather than imitation.
summary.zh: 通过执行验证排名的多教师课程通过RLVR而非模仿改进学生编码模型。

papers.title: Overthinking: Amplifying Reasoning Weights to Extract Learned Secrets

summary.en: Amplifies reasoning weights via task vectors to elicit hidden information and misalignment in language models during black-box auditing.
summary.zh: 通过任务向量放大推理权重，在黑盒审计中诱导语言模型隐藏信息和不对齐行为。

papers.title: SQuaD-SQL: Efficient Text-to-SQL with Small Language Models via LLM-Guided Knowledge Distillation

summary.en: Distills LLM knowledge into small language models for Text-to-SQL using synthetic data and parameter-efficient fine-tuning.
summary.zh: 通过合成数据和参数高效微调将LLM知识蒸馏到小型语言模型以执行文本转SQL任务。

papers.title: PLURAL: A Global Dataset for Value Alignment

summary.en: Large-scale preference dataset grounded in cross-cultural values survey, enabling culturally-aligned LLM training across 20 countries.
summary.zh: 基于跨文化价值观调查的大规模偏好数据集，支持20个国家的文化对齐LLM训练。

papers.title: When Implausible Tokens Get Reinforced: Tail-Aware Credit Calibration for LLM Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Proposes TACO to calibrate credit assignment in RL by identifying and suppressing reinforcement of low-probability erroneous tokens during LLM training.
summary.zh: 提出TACO方法通过识别和抑制低概率错误token的强化来校准LLM强化学习中的信用分配。

papers.title: Super Weights in LLMs and the Failure of Selective Training

summary.en: Shows Super Weights are not trainable in isolation; structured methods like LoRA succeed where selective training fails.
summary.zh: 证明超级权重无法单独训练；结构化方法如LoRA优于选择性训练。

papers.title: TTHE: Test-Time Harness Evolution

summary.en: Optimizes LLM agent harnesses at test time through evolutionary search over execution traces without model weight updates.
summary.zh: 通过在执行轨迹上进行演化搜索，在测试时优化LLM智能体的控制程序，无需更新模型权重。

papers.title: Reinforcing the Generation Order of Multimodal Masked Diffusion Models

summary.en: Uses GRPO to learn optimal generation ordering for multimodal diffusion models, improving text-to-image alignment and reasoning.
summary.zh: 使用GRPO学习多模态扩散模型的最优生成顺序，改进文本到图像对齐和推理性能。

papers.title: Efficient Safety Alignment of Language Models via Latent Personality Traits

summary.en: Efficient safety alignment using adversarial training on personality traits achieves robustness against jailbreaks without harmful data.
summary.zh: 通过对人格特征进行对抗训练实现高效安全对齐，无需有害数据即可抵御越狱攻击。

papers.title: LLM-as-a-Tutor: Policy-Aware Prompt Adaptation for Non-Verifiable RL

summary.en: Dynamically adapts training prompts during RL fine-tuning by using an LLM judge to detect non-challenging prompts and incrementally raise difficulty.
summary.zh: 通过LLM判断器动态检测非挑战性提示并逐步提高难度，在RL微调过程中自适应调整训练提示。

papers.title: MentalHospital: A Virtual Environment for Evaluating Psychiatric Clinical Encounters

summary.en: Benchmark for evaluating LLMs on psychiatric clinical encounters using SOAP workflow with expert-aligned domain-specific evaluators.
summary.zh: 使用SOAP工作流和专家对齐评估器评估LLM精神病学临床诊疗能力的基准。

papers.title: When Thinking Hurts: Epistemic Signals in the Reasoning Chains of Visual Language Models

summary.en: Analyzes uncertainty signals in reasoning chains of thinking-mode VLMs, showing chain entropy better predicts errors than answer entropy.
summary.zh: 分析思维模式视觉语言模型推理链中的不确定性信号，表明链熵比答案熵更好地预测错误。

papers.title: Teaching LLMs a Low-Resource Language: Enhancing Code Completion in Pharo

summary.en: Demonstrates data curation and fine-tuning pipeline for adapting code LLMs to low-resource languages like Pharo.
summary.zh: 展示了为低资源编程语言（如Pharo）适配代码LLM的数据策展和微调流程。

papers.title: Do You Need a Frontier Model as a Citation Verifier? Benchmarking Rubric LLMs for Deep-Research Source Attribution

summary.en: Benchmarks LLM judges as reward models for citation quality, showing cheaper models can match frontier models while revealing directional biases obscured by F1 metrics.
summary.zh: 基准测试LLM作为引文质量奖励模型，表明廉价模型可匹配前沿模型，同时揭示F1指标掩盖的方向性偏差。

papers.title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation

summary.en: Introduces OpenCoF dataset and Wan-CoF model for Chain-of-Frame video reasoning, demonstrating temporal supervision improves visual reasoning.
summary.zh: 提出OpenCoF数据集和Wan-CoF模型用于帧序列推理，证明时间监督改进视觉推理能力。

papers.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents

summary.en: Memory agent alongside action agents improves long-horizon task performance via selective memory injection and on-policy GRPO training.
summary.zh: 通过选择性记忆注入和在线GRPO训练，内存代理与动作代理协同改进长视界任务性能。

papers.title: KV-PRM: Efficient Process Reward Modeling via KV-Cache Transfer for Multi-Agent Test-Time Scaling

summary.en: KV-PRM leverages KV-cache transfer to reduce process reward model scoring cost from O(L²) to O(L) for efficient test-time scaling.
summary.zh: KV-PRM通过KV缓存转移将过程奖励模型的评分成本从O(L²)降至O(L)，实现高效的测试时扩展。

papers.title: Super-Tuning: From Activation-Aware Pruning to Sparse Fine-Tuning

summary.en: Sparse parameter-efficient fine-tuning using pruning-inspired saliency signals to select trainable parameters, combined with LoRA adapters.
summary.zh: 使用剪枝启发的显著性信号选择可训练参数的稀疏参数高效微调方法，结合LoRA适配器。

papers.title: Trust Region Policy Distillation

summary.en: Trust Region Policy Distillation stabilizes on-policy distillation through proximal teacher construction, improving reasoning task performance without computational overhead.
summary.zh: 信任域策略蒸馏通过近端教师构造稳定在线策略蒸馏，改进推理任务性能且无计算开销。

papers.title: Self-Guided Test-Time Training for Long-Context LLMs

summary.en: Self-guided test-time training that identifies relevant evidence spans before adaptation to improve long-context LLM reasoning.
summary.zh: 自引导测试时训练通过先识别相关证据片段再进行适应来改进长上下文LLM推理。

papers.title: Test-Time Scaling for Small VLMs on Multilingual Visual MCQ

summary.en: Investigates test-time scaling methods for small VLMs on multilingual visual MCQ, finding parseability and token budget matter more than sophisticated search.
summary.zh: 研究小型视觉语言模型的测试时间缩放方法，发现可解析性和token预算比复杂搜索更重要。

papers.title: Mach-Mind-4-Flash Technical Report

summary.en: MoE model using multi-teacher on-policy distillation and token-efficient policy optimization to match 100B models at 3B activated parameters.
summary.zh: 使用多教师在线蒸馏和令牌高效策略优化的混合专家模型，以3B激活参数匹配100B模型性能。

papers.title: Multimodal Reward Hacking in Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Studies reward hacking vulnerabilities in MLLM RL across algorithms and scales, introducing metrics to measure failure rates under optimization.
summary.zh: 研究多模态大语言模型强化学习中的奖励黑客漏洞，引入指标衡量优化下的失败率。

papers.title: Direct Image-to-Modern Vietnamese Translation of Han-Nom Manuscripts via Multimodal RLHF Preference Alignment

summary.en: Multimodal RLHF framework comparing PPO, DPO, and KTO for Han-Nom manuscript translation with image and text conditioning.
summary.zh: 多模态RLHF框架，比较PPO、DPO和KTO在汉喃手稿翻译中的性能，支持图像和文本条件。

papers.title: Proxy Exploration and Reusable Guidance: A Modular LLM Post-Training Paradigm via Proxy-Guided Update Signals

summary.en: Decouples exploration from alignment by using lightweight proxy models to generate reusable update signals, enabling efficient cross-model transfer.
summary.zh: 通过轻量代理模型生成可复用的更新信号来解耦探索与对齐，实现高效的跨模型迁移。

papers.title: SCOPE-RL: Optimizing Reasoning Paths Before and After Success

summary.en: Densifies sparse verifiable rewards in RLVR by adding prefix-decomposed rewards before success and process-shape rewards after success, improving accuracy and efficiency.
summary.zh: 通过在成功前添加前缀分解奖励和在成功后添加过程形状奖励，来加密RLVR中的稀疏可验证奖励，提高准确性和效率。

papers.title: MET: Theory-Grounded and Culture-Aware Multilingual Moral Reasoning

summary.en: Culture-aware multilingual moral reasoning via theory-grounded prompting and self-distillation training without external supervision.
summary.zh: 通过理论基础的提示和自蒸馏训练实现文化感知的多语言道德推理，无需外部监督。

papers.title: HyperSafe: Inference-Time Safety Recovery for Fine-Tuned Language Models

summary.en: HyperSafe restores safety alignment in fine-tuned models via model-specific networks generated at inference time without modifying weights.
summary.zh: HyperSafe通过在推理时生成模型特定网络来恢复微调模型的安全对齐，无需修改权重。

papers.title: The Ebb and Flow of Multimodal Focus: Scheduling Visual Relay Windows for Grounded VLM Reasoning

summary.en: Controls visual attention allocation in VLMs during inference to strengthen evidence-grounded multimodal reasoning through learned relay windows.
summary.zh: 通过学习的中继窗口控制VLM推理时的视觉注意力分配，增强证据驱动的多模态推理。

papers.title: TreeThink: A Modular Tree Search Library for Mathematical Reasoning with LLMs

summary.en: Open-source library for modular, asynchronous tree search in neural theorem proving with formal verifier integration.
summary.zh: 用于神经定理证明的模块化异步树搜索开源库，集成形式验证器支持。

papers.title: EasyOPD: An Easy-to-use On-Policy Distillation Framework for Large Language Models

summary.en: Framework for on-policy distillation bridging supervised fine-tuning and RL, supporting cross-tokenizer and step-wise supervision.
summary.zh: 支持跨分词器和逐步监督的在线策略蒸馏框架，连接监督微调和强化学习。

papers.title: SVR-R1: Bootstrapping Multi-modal Reasoning with Self-verification in Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Multi-turn RL framework using model self-verification as learning signal for vision-language reasoning with GRPO.
summary.zh: 使用模型自验证作为学习信号的多轮RL框架，通过GRPO改进视觉语言推理。

papers.title: Think Through a Bottleneck: Hourglass Reasoning for Rigorous Induction

summary.en: Hourglass reasoning enforces strict stage isolation with compressed symbolic states to improve few-shot inductive reasoning in LLMs.
summary.zh: 沙漏推理通过阶段间严格隔离和压缩符号状态来改进LLM的少样本归纳推理。

papers.title: Interaction Scaling: Grounding the Third Axis of Test-Time Compute

summary.en: Proposes interaction scaling as a third test-time compute axis: model proposes, external tool observes and provides grounded feedback, model revises iteratively.
summary.zh: 提出交互缩放作为第三种测试时计算轴：模型提议、外部工具观察并提供基于实际反馈、模型迭代修订。

papers.title: Efficient Test-Time Optimization for Multi-Agent Proof Autoformalization

summary.en: Multi-agent framework with test-time optimization for proof autoformalization using formal verification and semantic rubrics.
summary.zh: 使用形式化验证和语义评分的多智能体测试时间优化框架用于证明自动形式化。

papers.title: Valid $\ne$ Necessary: Diagnosing Latent Inefficiency in Chain-of-Thought

summary.en: Diagnoses inefficient reasoning steps in CoT via information-theoretic metric CAID; achieves 31-53% token reduction while maintaining accuracy.
summary.zh: 通过信息论指标CAID诊断CoT中的低效推理步骤；在保持准确性的同时实现31-53%的token减少。

papers.title: OS-Pruner: Pruning Chains-of-Thought of Reasoning Models via Optimal Stopping

summary.en: Lightweight framework for pruning reasoning chains via optimal stopping, reducing generation length while maintaining accuracy.
summary.zh: 通过最优停止问题框架修剪推理链的轻量级方法，在保持准确性的同时减少生成长度。

papers.title: When the Reward Suite Is Leaky: A Preregistered Causal Contrast of Natural Verifier False Positives in RLVR

summary.en: Empirical study of false positives in code test-suite rewards for RLVR, showing persistent task-specific errors don't significantly harm training outcomes.
summary.zh: 关于RLVR代码测试套件奖励中假正例的实证研究，表明持久的任务特定错误不会显著损害训练结果。

papers.title: UMoE:Unlocking Every Expert in Domain-Specific Training

summary.en: Realigns MoE expert pools to target domains via pruning and perturbation-based expansion before SFT, preserving inference cost.
summary.zh: 通过剪枝和基于扰动的专家扩展在SFT前重新调整MoE专家池到目标域，保持推理成本不变。

papers.title: Calibrated e-CUSUM Decoding for Quantized Reasoning Models: Why Token Log-Probability Is the Wrong Observable for Decoding Monitors

summary.en: Proposes calibrated e-CUSUM decoding monitor to detect chain-of-thought degradation in quantized reasoning models beyond token log-probability.
summary.zh: 提出校准的e-CUSUM解码监测器，用于检测量化推理模型中的思维链退化，超越令牌对数概率。

papers.title: Verifier-Based Reinforcement Fine-Tuning of Reasoning Models for Thermal Energy Storage Control

summary.en: Adapts reasoning models via RL with verifiable DP-based rewards for building thermal energy storage control scheduling.
summary.zh: 通过可验证的动态规划奖励使用强化学习适配推理模型以进行建筑热能存储控制调度。

papers.title: Visual Access Boundaries in Vision-Language Model Reasoning

summary.en: Analyzes what visual information Chain-of-Thought reasoning in VLMs actually uses via causal intervention, revealing CoT operates primarily on early visual representations.
summary.zh: 通过因果干预分析VLM中链式思考推理实际使用的视觉信息，揭示CoT主要在早期视觉表示上操作。

papers.title: From Critic to Confidence: PPO for Language-Based Quantitative Prediction with Confidence Estimation

summary.en: PPO framework for language-based quantitative prediction that jointly learns accurate estimates and reliable confidence signals via a critic-based value function.
summary.zh: 通过批评家价值函数联合学习精确估计和可靠置信度信号的语言量化预测PPO框架。

papers.title: Ring-Zero: Scaling Zero RL to a Trillion Parameters for Emergent Reasoning

summary.en: Scales zero RL with verifiable rewards to 1T parameters, demonstrating emergent reasoning behaviors and proposing structured CoT evaluation metrics.
summary.zh: 将具有可验证奖励的零RL扩展到1万亿参数,展示涌现推理行为并提出结构化思维链评估指标。

papers.title: Do We Really Need Multimodal Emotion Language Models Larger Than 1B Parameters?

summary.en: Knowledge distillation framework for lightweight multimodal emotion recognition using optimal transport loss and GRPO-based multi-reward optimization.
summary.zh: 使用最优传输损失和基于GRPO的多奖励优化的轻量级多模态情感识别知识蒸馏框架。

papers.title: Evidence-Grounded Verified Agentic Reasoning: A Path Toward Eliminating LLM Hallucination in Empirical Inference via Tool-Attested Kernel Proofs

summary.en: Lean 4 framework for verified agentic reasoning with tool-attestation, ensuring outputs structurally descend from attested evidence and kernel-checked inference.
summary.zh: 基于Lean 4的验证智能体推理框架，通过工具认证确保输出来自证实证据和内核检查推理。

papers.title: A Learning-Rate-Gated Failure of GRPO in a Small Language and Vision-Language Model Web Agent: A Controlled Null and Its Mechanism

summary.en: Controlled study showing GRPO fails to improve small web agents on mastered tasks; reveals learning-rate-dependent failure mechanisms.
summary.zh: 受控研究表明GRPO在小型网页代理已掌握的任务上失效；揭示学习率相关的失败机制。

papers.title: PFAdapter: Hierarchical LoRA Decomposition for Personalized Federated MLLMs

summary.en: Hierarchical LoRA decomposition framework for federated fine-tuning of MLLMs, separating global and local adapter components.
summary.zh: 用于MLLM联邦微调的分层LoRA分解框架，分离全局和本地适配器组件。

papers.title: Metacognition in LLMs: Foundations, Progress, and Opportunities

summary.en: Comprehensive survey of metacognition in LLMs, covering measurement, elicitation techniques, and applications for improving model capabilities and reliability.
summary.zh: 关于LLM中元认知的综合综述，涵盖测量、启发技术和改进模型能力与可靠性的应用。

papers.title: Learning Mechanistic Reasoning for Chemical Reactions with Large Language Models

summary.en: Fine-tunes LLMs on mechanistic reasoning for chemical reactions using a large-scale dataset and introduces FukuyamaBench benchmark.
summary.zh: 使用大规模数据集对LLM进行化学反应机理推理的微调，并引入FukuyamaBench基准。

papers.title: Track, Rank, Crack: Epistemic Working Memory Scales Multi-Hop Reasoning in Language Agents

summary.en: SLEUTH improves multi-hop reasoning in language agents by maintaining explicit epistemic working memory (facts, hypotheses, questions) instead of implicit context.
summary.zh: SLEUTH通过维护显式认识论工作记忆（事实、假设、问题）而非隐式上下文，改进语言代理的多跳推理。

papers.title: Resist and Update: Counterfactual Report Coordinates for Incentive-Compatible LLMs

summary.en: Method for learning and certifying counterfactual report mediators that make LLM outputs invariant to non-evidential incentive pressure while responsive to genuine evidence.
summary.zh: 学习和认证反事实报告中介的方法，使LLM输出对非证据性激励压力不变，同时对真实证据保持响应。

papers.title: Function-Aware Fill-in-the-Middle as Mid-Training for Coding Agent Foundation Models

summary.en: Function-aware fill-in-the-middle mid-training improves coding agents by leveraging program dependency graphs to condition on tool returns.
summary.zh: 函数感知的中间填充中训练通过程序依赖图来改进编码智能体对工具返回的条件作用。

papers.title: Exploring Post-Training Alignment of Small Language Models for Biomedical Data-to-Text Generation: A Case Study of Medication Leaflet

summary.en: Comparative study of SFT, DPO, ORPO, and GRPO for biomedical data-to-text generation with Qwen SLMs.
summary.zh: 针对生物医学数据转文本生成任务比较SFT、DPO、ORPO和GRPO的研究。

papers.title: Post-Training Shifts Confidence: A Three-Stage Analysis of How SFT, RL, and OPD Shape Pre-, Intra-, and Post-CoT Calibration

summary.en: Analyzes how SFT, RL, and OPD reshape confidence calibration across reasoning stages, proposing position-aware strategies.
summary.zh: 分析SFT、RL和OPD如何重塑推理阶段的置信度校准，提出位置感知策略。

papers.title: Groc-PO: Grounded Context Preference Optimization for Truthful Multimodal LLMs

summary.en: Groc-PO extends DPO with multi-stage preference supervision to mitigate hallucinations and error propagation in multimodal reasoning.
summary.zh: Groc-PO通过多阶段偏好监督扩展DPO，以减轻多模态推理中的幻觉和错误传播。

papers.title: LAPO: Leave-One-Turn Attribution for Self-Generated Process Rewards in Multi-Turn Search Reasoning

summary.en: Self-generated process rewards for multi-turn search reasoning via backward leave-one-turn attribution without auxiliary models.
summary.zh: 通过反向留一轮归因为多轮搜索推理生成过程奖励，无需辅助模型。

papers.title: Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations

summary.en: Systematic study of on-policy distillation dynamics, identifying student-teacher mismatch and length exploitation pathologies, proposing signal regulation techniques.
summary.zh: 系统研究在策略蒸馏的动力学，识别学生-教师失配和长度利用病态，提出信号调节技术。

papers.title: Meta-Learning Preferences for Multilingual LLM Alignment

summary.en: Meta-learning framework for multilingual preference alignment, enabling effective DPO and RLHF adaptation to low-resource target languages with minimal data.
summary.zh: 用于多语言偏好对齐的元学习框架，通过跨语言数据迁移实现低资源目标语言的有效DPO和RLHF自适应。

papers.title: Consensus as Privileged Context for Label-Free Self-Distillation

summary.en: Label-free self-distillation using consensus-anchored teacher supervision at token level to improve reasoning accuracy.
summary.zh: 使用共识锚定的教师监督进行无标签自蒸馏，在token级别改进推理准确性。

papers.title: Where Should RL Post-Training Compute Go? Model Size, Search, Learning, and Feedback

summary.en: Studies optimal compute allocation across model size, rollouts, learning, and reward feedback in GRPO post-training under fixed budgets.
summary.zh: 研究GRPO后训练中模型大小、rollout、学习和奖励反馈之间的最优计算分配。

papers.title: EXPLORE: Exploration with Guided Search for Analog Topology Generation using Language Models

summary.en: Integrates Monte Carlo Tree Search with transformer decoding for test-time scaling in analog circuit topology generation.
summary.zh: 将蒙特卡洛树搜索与变压器解码集成，用于模拟电路拓扑生成的测试时间扩展。

papers.title: Navigating the Mirage: A Dual-Path Agentic Framework for Robust Misleading Chart Question Answering

summary.en: Agentic framework for chart QA using Oracle-Informed SFT and Deception-Aware GRPO for reasoning distillation and adversarial alignment.
summary.zh: 使用Oracle监督SFT和欺骗感知GRPO进行推理蒸馏和对抗对齐的图表QA智能体框架。

papers.title: Deep Interaction: An Efficient Human-AI Interaction Method for Large Reasoning Models

summary.en: Efficient human-in-the-loop correction method for CoT reasoning errors via direct editing and distilled prompts.
summary.zh: 通过直接编辑和蒸馏提示实现CoT推理错误的高效人类纠正方法。

papers.title: TRACE: Turn-level Reward Assignment via Credit Estimation for Long-Horizon Agents

summary.en: Dense credit-assignment method for long-horizon agentic RL using log-ratio TD without process labels or additional critics.
summary.zh: 基于对数比率TD的密集信用分配方法，用于长视野智能体强化学习，无需过程标签或额外评论家。

papers.title: The Refusal Residue: When Probes Catch Alignment Faking and When They Don't

summary.en: Investigates whether hidden states reveal alignment faking in LLMs, proposing measurement controls for detection robustness.
summary.zh: 研究隐藏状态是否能揭示大模型的对齐欺骗行为，并提出检测稳健性的测量控制框架。

papers.title: ShortOPD: Recovering Pruned LLMs with Short-to-Long On-Policy Distillation

summary.en: Short-to-long on-policy distillation schedule recovers pruned LLMs by detecting repetitive suffixes and allocating rollout budget efficiently.
summary.zh: 短到长的在线策略蒸馏调度通过检测重复后缀并高效分配推导预算来恢复剪枝LLM。

papers.title: Constraint-Driven Model Optimization: An Industry Framework for Selecting Compression and Acceleration Techniques in Modern Machine Learning Systems

summary.en: Framework for selecting model compression and acceleration techniques based on deployment constraints, including knowledge distillation and PEFT.
summary.zh: 基于部署约束选择模型压缩和加速技术的框架，包括知识蒸馏和参数高效微调。

papers.title: What LLM Forecasters Know but Don't Say: Probing Internal Representations for Calibration and Faithfulness

summary.en: Probes internal representations to improve calibration, detect faithfulness failures, and audit reasoning in fine-tuned forecasting models.
summary.zh: 通过探测内部表示来改进校准、检测推理不忠诚性并审计微调预测模型。

papers.title: AIMO Interpretability Challenge

summary.en: Competition framework for evaluating mathematical reasoning robustness in frontier LLMs using interpretability and adversarial variants.
summary.zh: 通过可解释性和对抗变体评估前沿LLM数学推理鲁棒性的竞赛框架。

papers.title: SPyCE: Skill-Policy Co-evolution for Multimodal Agents

summary.en: Distills multimodal RL trajectories into hierarchical skills that co-evolve with policy during training, bridging distillation and RL.
summary.zh: 将多模态RL轨迹蒸馏为分层技能，在训练过程中与策略共同演进，桥接蒸馏与强化学习。

papers.title: Stop Thinking, Start Looking: Efficient Post-Training for Multimodal Document Question Answering via Reasoning-Free Alignment

summary.en: Applies GRPO to multimodal document QA, showing reasoning-free alignment achieves better efficiency and grounding precision than reasoning-enabled RL.
summary.zh: 将GRPO应用于多模态文档问答，证明无推理对齐比推理启用的强化学习获得更好的效率和定位精度。

papers.title: Leveraging Instruction Tuning and Merging for Reasoning Model Adaptation

summary.en: Combines instruction tuning with model merging to improve reasoning models on verifiable and unverifiable domains while preserving general capabilities.
summary.zh: 通过指令调优与模型合并相结合，在可验证和不可验证的领域改进推理模型，同时保持通用能力。

papers.title: A Continuous-Time Reinforcement Learning Framework for Fine-Tuning Discrete Diffusion Models

summary.en: Continuous-time RL framework for fine-tuning discrete diffusion LLMs with intermediate rewards and efficient trajectory likelihood estimation.
summary.zh: 用于微调离散扩散LLM的连续时间强化学习框架，支持中间奖励和高效轨迹似然估计。

papers.title: Non-vacuous Generalization Bounds for Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards

summary.en: Establishes non-vacuous generalization bounds for parameter-efficient RLVR fine-tuning via PAC-Bayes compression and on-policy distillation.
summary.zh: 通过PAC-Bayes压缩和在线蒸馏为参数高效的RLVR微调建立非平凡泛化界。

papers.title: On-Policy Delta Distillation

summary.en: Introduces delta signal distillation for on-policy learning, capturing reasoning capability changes between teacher and base models.
summary.zh: 引入Delta信号蒸馏用于在线策略学习，捕捉教师模型与基础模型间的推理能力变化。

papers.title: Digital Pantheon: Simulating and Auditing Coalition Formation with LLM Agents

summary.en: Multi-agent framework using SFT and DPO to simulate ideologically-aligned partisan negotiation with interpretable coalition agreement provenance.
summary.zh: 使用SFT和DPO的多智能体框架，用于模拟意识形态对齐的党派谈判，具有可解释的联盟协议溯源。

papers.title: Answer-Conditioned Chains of Thought Degrade Verifiable-Reasoning Distillation in Large Language Models

summary.en: Answer-conditioned chain-of-thought generation degrades reasoning distillation by causing models to rationalize backward rather than derive answers.
summary.zh: 答案条件化的思维链生成通过导致模型反向推理而非正向推导来降低推理蒸馏效果。

papers.title: Gold-Guided Programmatic Distillation for Financial Reasoning over Hybrid Tables and Text

summary.en: Execution-verified programmatic distillation transfers reliable numerical reasoning from teacher to student using verified Python programs as supervision.
summary.zh: 通过执行验证的Python程序作为监督信号，将教师模型的可靠数值推理蒸馏到学生模型。

papers.title: CIPHER: A Decoupled Exploration-Selection Framework for Test-Time Scaling of Data Science Agents

summary.en: Decoupled exploration-selection framework for test-time scaling of data science agents through parallel initial state generation and strategic selection.
summary.zh: 通过并行初始状态生成和战略选择，实现数据科学智能体测试时间扩展的解耦探索-选择框架。

papers.title: CoTu at EXACT 2026: Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning for Transparent Educational QA

summary.en: Neuro-symbolic Program-of-Thought pipeline combining distillation and self-correction for transparent reasoning in small 4B models.
summary.zh: 结合蒸馏和自我纠正的神经符号程序思维管道，用于小型4B模型中的透明推理。

papers.title: Beyond Entropy: Correctness-Aware Advantage Shaping via Contrastive Policy Optimization

summary.en: Contrastive Policy Optimization uses token-level disagreement for correctness-aware advantage shaping in reasoning RL, outperforming entropy-based methods.
summary.zh: 对比策略优化通过令牌级分歧实现正确性感知的优势塑造，超越了基于熵的推理强化学习方法。

papers.title: SD-MAR: Multi-image Analytical Reasoning via Synthetic Data and Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Trains VLMs on multi-image analytical reasoning using GRPO-lite with Backward Discounted Allocation, a verifiable-reward RL approach for visual reasoning.
summary.zh: 使用GRPO-lite和反向折扣分配训练VLM进行多图像分析推理,一种用于视觉推理的可验证奖励RL方法。

papers.title: Length Penalties Make Chain-of-Thought Less Monitorable

summary.en: Shows length-penalized reasoning compression hides model influences from monitoring, reducing interpretability despite maintaining accuracy.
summary.zh: 证明长度惩罚的推理压缩会隐藏模型影响因素，降低可监测性，尽管保持准确度。

papers.title: Long-Context Fine-Tuning with Limited VRAM

summary.en: Combines hierarchical attention with segment-wise backpropagation and tiered KV storage to enable parameter-efficient fine-tuning on long sequences within limited VRAM.
summary.zh: 结合分层注意力、分段反向传播和分层KV存储，在有限VRAM下实现参数高效的长序列微调。

papers.title: Step-Level Preference Learning for Generative Agents in Social Simulations

summary.en: Collects 57K step-level preference annotations for LLM agents and applies SFT and DPO to improve decision-making and social behavior.
summary.zh: 收集57K步级偏好标注用于LLM智能体，通过SFT和DPO改进决策和社交行为。

papers.title: ToolAlignBench: Investigating Alignment Conflicts in Tool-Calling Enabled LLMs

summary.en: Benchmark revealing conflicts between safety alignment and deployment instructions in tool-calling agents, with analysis of abliteration effects.
summary.zh: 基准测试揭示工具调用代理中安全对齐与部署指令的冲突,并分析消融的影响。

papers.title: OvisOCR2 Technical Report

summary.en: End-to-end document parser using SFT, RL with multi-component rewards, and on-policy distillation into a 0.8B model.
summary.zh: 使用SFT、多组件奖励的强化学习和在线策略蒸馏的端到端文档解析器。

papers.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Self-evolving framework that extracts hindsight skills from on-policy trajectories and distills them back into the policy for dense supervision.
summary.zh: 自演进框架，从在策略轨迹中提取后见之明技能，并将其蒸馏回策略模型以获得密集监督。

papers.title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging

summary.en: SAR extracts reasoning-effective spectral components from RL updates to preserve performance, improve exploration, and enable model merging.
summary.zh: SAR从强化学习更新中提取推理有效的谱分量，以保留性能、改进探索和实现模型合并。

papers.title: Value Leakage: An LLM's Answers Are Silently Shaped by Its Own Values

summary.en: Empirical study revealing how LLMs' internal values covertly influence their answers on unverifiable questions, with limited disclosure.
summary.zh: 实证研究揭示大型语言模型的内在价值观如何暗中影响其对不可验证问题的回答,且披露不足。

papers.title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget

summary.en: Architecture-aware execution stack enabling million-token RL post-training with GRPO under fixed GPU memory constraints.
summary.zh: 支持百万token规模RL后训练的架构感知执行栈，在固定GPU内存预算下实现GRPO。

papers.title: GRASP: GRanularity-Aware Search Policy for Agentic RAG

summary.en: RL framework training agents to adaptively coordinate retrieval tools and control context granularity for multi-hop reasoning in agentic RAG.
summary.zh: 训练智能体自适应协调检索工具和控制上下文粒度的强化学习框架，用于多跳推理中的RAG系统。

papers.title: T^2MLR: Transformer with Temporal Middle-Layer Recurrence

summary.en: Introduces middle-layer recurrence in Transformers to enable persistent abstract reasoning across decoding steps with minimal overhead.
summary.zh: 在Transformer中引入中层循环，使抽象推理能够在解码步骤中持久化，开销最小。

papers.title: Mask-Aware Policy Gradients for Diffusion Language Models

summary.en: Applies RL with verifiable rewards to masked diffusion language models via decomposed policy gradients for token and masking decisions.
summary.zh: 通过分解策略梯度将RL应用于掩码扩散语言模型，同时优化令牌和掩码决策。

papers.title: Understanding Reasoning from Pretraining to Post-Training

summary.en: Studies how pretraining shapes RL post-training returns using chess as a controlled testbed with verifiable rewards.
summary.zh: 使用国际象棋作为受控测试平台，研究预训练如何影响RL后训练的回报，采用可验证的奖励。

papers.title: Better Starts, Better Ends: Bootstrapped Iterative Self-Reasoning Distillation for Compressed Reasoning

summary.en: Two-stage self-distillation method bootstrapping concise reasoning through brevity-instructed SFT before on-policy reverse-KL distillation.
summary.zh: 通过简洁性指令SFT预热后进行在线反向KL蒸馏的两阶段自我推理蒸馏方法。

papers.title: Recursive Harness Self-Improvement

summary.en: Optimizes task-specific harnesses iteratively using pairwise feedback to improve execution-trace quality for future model training.
summary.zh: 通过迭代优化任务特定的提示框架，利用成对反馈改进执行轨迹质量以支持未来模型训练。

papers.title: CRAFT: Clustering Rubrics to Diagnose Weak LLM Capabilities and Generate Targeted Fine-Tuning Data

summary.en: CRAFT diagnoses weak LLM capabilities via rubric clustering and generates targeted supervised fine-tuning data for improved model performance.
summary.zh: CRAFT通过评分标准聚类诊断LLM薄弱能力，并生成针对性的监督微调数据以提升模型性能。

papers.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?

summary.en: Studies Muon optimizer's effectiveness in sparse-reward agentic RL, showing 88% improvement over AdamW under GiGPO on ALFWorld tasks.
summary.zh: 研究Muon优化器在稀疏奖励智能体强化学习中的效果，在ALFWorld任务上GiGPO下相比AdamW提升88%。

papers.title: More with Less: a Large Scale Remote Sensing VLM with a Simple Recipe

summary.en: Multi-task RL framework with adaptive rewards trains a general VLM for remote sensing, showing data scale outweighs architectural specialization.
summary.zh: 多任务RL框架采用自适应奖励训练通用VLM用于遥感，证明数据规模比架构创新更重要。

papers.title: Knowledge-Centric Agents for Workflow Generation

summary.en: Framework that distills hierarchical knowledge from workflows and uses supervised fine-tuning to teach LLMs to reason from tasks to executable structures.
summary.zh: 从工作流蒸馏分层知识，通过监督微调教导LLM从任务推理到可执行结构的框架。

papers.title: QUADS: Stabilizing NVFP4 Reinforcement Learning for MoE via QUantization-error Alignment across Dual Sides

summary.en: Stabilizes low-precision NVFP4 quantization for RL rollout generation in MoE models via activation-aware compensation techniques.
summary.zh: 通过激活感知补偿技术稳定MoE模型中RL rollout生成的低精度NVFP4量化。

papers.title: ToolSciVer: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification with Visual Tool Augmented Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Tool-augmented VLM for scientific claim verification trained with GRPO and composite rewards for multimodal reasoning.
summary.zh: 使用GRPO和复合奖励训练的工具增强VLM，用于多模态科学声明验证推理。

papers.title: Cura 1T: Specialized Model for Agentic Healthcare

summary.en: Healthcare LLM trained via human-gated self-evolution loop that iteratively improves data mixture based on benchmark failures.
summary.zh: 通过人类把关的自进化循环训练的医疗保健LLM，根据基准测试失败迭代改进数据混合。

papers.title: MADA-RL: Multi-Agent Debate-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in Compact Models

summary.en: Multi-agent debate framework with counterfactual critic advantage for parameter-efficient reasoning in compact models via LoRA.
summary.zh: 具有反事实评论家优势的多智能体辩论框架，通过LoRA实现紧凑型模型的参数高效推理。

papers.title: Distilled Reinforcement Learning for LLM Post-training

summary.en: Integrates teacher supervision into RL objectives for fine-grained guidance, enabling effective knowledge transfer across model families.
summary.zh: 将教师监督集成到RL目标中以提供细粒度指导，实现跨模型族的有效知识转移。

papers.title: OR Else: A Differentiable Trust Region for Policy Optimization

summary.en: Proposes Output Reset (OR), a smooth one-sided saturation alternative to PPO's clipped objective for LLM post-training.
summary.zh: 提出输出重置（OR）作为PPO裁剪目标的平滑单侧饱和替代方案，用于大语言模型后训练。

papers.title: DeLIVeR: Decomposed Learning for Information-grounded Veracity Recognition via Reinforced Knowledge Graph Exploration

summary.en: Uses GRPO to optimize LLM planning for knowledge graph traversal in fact-checking, combining reasoning RL with verifiable rewards.
summary.zh: 使用GRPO优化LLM规划，通过知识图谱遍历进行事实核查，结合推理强化学习与可验证奖励。

papers.title: A Dual-Hypothesis Reasoning Framework for LLM Guardrails

summary.en: ARBITER uses dual-hypothesis reasoning and multi-component SFT with LoRA for interpretable, cost-effective LLM safety guardrails.
summary.zh: ARBITER 采用双假设推理和多组件SFT与LoRA实现可解释的、成本效益高的LLM安全护栏。

papers.title: SciForma: Structure-Faithful Generation of Scientific Diagrams

summary.en: Multi-Dimensional Conjunctive Preference Optimization enforces simultaneous correctness across structural axes in scientific diagram generation.
summary.zh: 多维联合偏好优化在科学图表生成中同时确保结构各轴的正确性。

papers.title: PPL-Factory: Task-Aware and Budget-Aware Data Selection from Language Modeling to Reasoning

summary.en: Task-aware perplexity-based data selection framework that efficiently selects training samples for instruction tuning and reasoning tasks.
summary.zh: 基于困惑度的任务感知数据选择框架，高效选择指令调优和推理任务的训练样本。

papers.title: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for Parameter-Efficient Finetuning

summary.en: Proposes Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), a novel PEFT method that learns residual routing for efficient finetuning of frozen Transformers.
summary.zh: 提出流形约束超连接(mHC),一种新颖的参数高效微调方法,通过学习残差路由来高效微调冻结的Transformer模型。

papers.title: Enhancing Rubric-based RL via Self-Distillation

summary.en: Self-distillation method addressing exploration and criterion suppression failures in rubric-based RL for open-ended tasks.
summary.zh: 通过自蒸馏方法解决基于规则的强化学习中的探索和准则抑制问题的方法。

papers.title: What Transfers Under Source Shift? Definitions, Examples, and Fine-Tuning for Climate Disclosure Classification

summary.en: Studies how LLM adaptation strategies (definitions, examples, LoRA fine-tuning) transfer across source-shifted climate classification tasks.
summary.zh: 研究定义、示例和LoRA微调等LLM适配策略在源偏移气候分类任务中的迁移效果。

papers.title: A Geometric Perspective on Stabilizing Value Conflict Resolution

summary.en: Uses geometric loss landscape analysis to show CoT reasoning smooths optimization and improves moral reasoning under value conflicts.
summary.zh: 通过几何损失景观分析证明思维链推理可平滑优化并改进价值冲突下的道德推理。

papers.title: Benchmarking Resource-Efficient LLMs for Research Topic Ontology Generation in the Biomedical Field

summary.en: Evaluates fine-tuning strategies for small LLMs on biomedical ontology generation, showing 34.1% F1 improvement over prompting baselines.
summary.zh: 评估小型语言模型在生物医学本体生成中的微调策略，微调相比提示基线提升F1分数34.1%。

papers.title: When a Name Is Not a Name: A Benchmark Dataset and Distilled Reasoning for Culturally Entangled Bangla Homographs in Low-Resource LLMs

summary.en: Benchmark and distillation method for disambiguating culturally entangled Bangla homographs, reducing dominant-meaning bias in small models.
summary.zh: 用于消除孟加拉语文化同形异义词歧义的基准和蒸馏方法，显著降低小型模型的主导义偏差。

papers.title: PoLoRA: A Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA Optimizer

summary.en: PoLoRA: a matrix-aware optimizer for LoRA that uses spectral updates and preconditioning to reduce training steps by 1.2–1.7× versus Adam.
summary.zh: PoLoRA：一个矩阵感知的LoRA优化器，使用谱更新和预处理，相比Adam减少1.2-1.7倍的训练步数。

papers.title: Why Does Feedback-Augmented Self-Distillation Fail to Improve Retrieval-Interleaved Search Agents?

summary.en: Studies on-policy self-distillation for agentic search, identifies decoding collapse failure mode, proposes EMA teacher to stabilize supervision signals.
summary.zh: 研究智能体搜索的在策略自蒸馏，识别解码坍缩失败模式，提出EMA教师稳定监督信号。

papers.title: Group Entropy-Controlled Policy Optimization

summary.en: Proposes GEPO, a group-based entropy control method for heterogeneous task RL that improves upon GRPO with adaptive advantage shaping.
summary.zh: 提出GEPO，一种基于分组的熵控制方法，用于异构任务RL，通过自适应优势塑形改进GRPO。

papers.title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks

summary.en: Experiential Learning repurposes LLM feedback into dense supervisory signals for on-policy context distillation, outperforming scalar reward RL on open-ended tasks.
summary.zh: 经验学习将LLM反馈重新用于策略内上下文蒸馏，在开放式任务上超过标量奖励RL。

papers.title: How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?

summary.en: Studies how alignment tuning installs cue-induced biases as distinct representational directions, enabling causal intervention and debiasing.
summary.zh: 研究对齐调优如何将提示诱导偏差作为不同的表示方向植入，支持因果干预和去偏。

papers.title: Can We Break LLMs Out of Self-Loops? Fine-Grained Reasoning Control with Activation Steering

summary.en: Fine-grained control over reasoning trajectories via activation steering to prevent self-loops and improve reasoning quality.
summary.zh: 通过激活向量引导对推理轨迹的精细控制，防止自循环并提高推理质量。

papers.title: Uncovering Latent Reasoning Strategies in Language Models

summary.en: Decomposes LM response distributions into latent strategy representations using variational inference with information-gain objectives.
summary.zh: 通过信息增益目标的变分推断将语言模型响应分布分解为隐式策略表示。

papers.title: CASE: Causal Alignment and Structural Enforcement for Improving Chain-of-Thought Faithfulness

summary.en: Improves CoT faithfulness through causal alignment training and attention masking to prevent instruction-answer shortcuts.
summary.zh: 通过因果对齐训练和注意力掩蔽防止指令-答案捷径，改进链式思考的忠实性。

papers.title: ISO: An RLVR-Native Optimization Stack

summary.en: Isospectral Optimization framework for RLVR that reuses base model spectra while optimizing singular frames, enabling efficient merging and faster convergence.
summary.zh: 等谱优化框架用于RLVR，复用基础模型谱结构同时优化奇异向量，实现高效合并和更快收敛。

papers.title: Reasoning Fine-Tuning Induces Persistent Latent Policy States

summary.en: Analyzes how reasoning fine-tuning reorganizes model internals into latent policy states that specialize for multi-step reasoning.
summary.zh: 分析推理微调如何将模型内部重组为专门用于多步推理的潜在策略状态。

papers.title: DeepSearch-World: Self-Distillation for Deep Search Agents in a Verifiable Environment

summary.en: Self-distillation framework for web agents using verifiable environment with progress verification, enabling scalable self-evolution without teacher distillation.
summary.zh: 用于网络代理的自蒸馏框架，利用可验证环境和进度验证实现可扩展的自演进，无需教师蒸馏。

papers.title: H$^2$SD: Hybrid Hindsight Self-Distillation

summary.en: Hybrid self-distillation framework that adaptively uses teacher signals based on trajectory correctness for efficient reasoning optimization.
summary.zh: 混合自蒸馏框架，根据轨迹正确性自适应地使用教师信号以实现高效推理优化。

papers.title: Off-Context GRPO: Learning to Reason on Hard Problems using Privileged Information

summary.en: Off-Context GRPO uses privileged guidance during training with importance correction to improve reasoning on hard problems where standard RLVR fails.
summary.zh: Off-Context GRPO在训练中使用特权指导和重要性修正，改进标准RLVR在难题上的失败。

papers.title: The Price of Reasoning: Cost-Quality Tradeoffs in Reinforcement Learning for Neural Machine Translation

summary.en: Studies cost-quality tradeoffs of reasoning traces in RLVR for neural machine translation, showing reasoning benefits inference more than training.
summary.zh: 研究RLVR中推理轨迹的成本-质量权衡，发现推理对推理阶段的收益大于训练阶段。

papers.title: Reasoning Before Translation: Enhancing Legal Machine Translation with Structured Reasoning

summary.en: Compares SFT and RL with verifiable rewards for legal machine translation, showing RL outperforms SFT on small models.
summary.zh: 比较了法律机器翻译中的有监督微调和可验证奖励强化学习，证明RL在小模型上优于SFT。

papers.title: Adopting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Molecular Generation

summary.en: Applies reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards and GRPO to guide LLM-based molecular generation toward desired chemical properties.
summary.zh: 使用可验证奖励和GRPO强化学习指导基于LLM的分子生成朝向所需的化学性质优化。

papers.title: Beyond Score Prediction: LLM-Based Essay Scoring and Feedback Generation via Reinforcement Learning with Rubric Rewards

summary.en: LLM framework optimizing essay scoring and feedback generation via RL with rubric-based verifiable rewards and adaptive gating.
summary.zh: 通过基于规则的可验证奖励和自适应门控，优化论文评分和反馈生成的强化学习框架。

papers.title: DAIS: Dependency-Aware Intermediate QA Supervision for Complex Reasoning

summary.en: Converts teacher rationales into dependency-aware intermediate QA supervision to improve multi-step reasoning during supervised fine-tuning.
summary.zh: 将教师理由转换为依赖感知的中间QA监督，以改进监督微调期间的多步推理。

papers.title: RF-Agent: A Practical Framework for Building Language Agents for RFIC Design

summary.en: Textbook-driven knowledge distillation creates an RF circuit design dataset and benchmark, studying SFT and RAG adaptation strategies.
summary.zh: 通过教科书驱动的知识蒸馏创建射频电路设计数据集和基准，研究SFT和RAG适配策略。

papers.title: RAGAL: A Frugal, Fully Local Retrieval-Augmented Assistant for Technical Support at a Government Agency

summary.en: Fine-tunes retriever embeddings on domain-specific tickets using locally-generated queries, eliminating cloud dependencies for technical support.
summary.zh: 在本地生成查询数据上微调检索器嵌入，消除技术支持中的云依赖。

papers.title: LatentMT: Machine Translation with Latent Reasoning

summary.en: Studies latent-reasoning loop language models for machine translation, achieving efficiency through recurrent hidden-state computation instead of explicit reasoning tokens.
summary.zh: 研究机器翻译中的隐式推理循环语言模型，通过循环隐状态计算而非显式推理tokens实现高效性。

papers.title: RRPO: Reference-Relative Policy Optimization with Stratified Conditional Rollouts

summary.en: Generalizes group-relative RL to settings without task verifiers using reference-relative contrastive comparisons and stratified rollouts.
summary.zh: 通过参考相对对比比较和分层rollout将组相对强化学习推广到无任务验证器的设置。

papers.title: Selective State-Space Adaptation and Retrieval for Language Model Reasoning

summary.en: Proposes MaLoRA and MaRA, state-space adapters with token-level and context-level recurrence for improved reasoning on frozen LLMs.
summary.zh: 提出MaLoRA和MaRA，具有令牌级和上下文级递归的状态空间适配器，改进冻结LLM的推理能力。

papers.title: Athena-Brain Technical Report: An Efficient Robot Brain for General Intelligence and Embodied Interactio

summary.en: Multi-stage post-training pipeline combining SFT, RL, expert training, and model merging to create efficient embodied LLM.
summary.zh: 通过SFT、强化学习、专家训练和模型融合的多阶段后训练流程创建高效的具身化LLM。

papers.title: Fishing Out Free Riders: Shapley-Based Reward Attribution for Parallel Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Uses Shapley values to attribute fine-grained rewards to individual reasoning paths in parallel reasoning, improving RL training stability.
summary.zh: 利用Shapley值为平行推理中的单个推理路径分配细粒度奖励，提高RL训练稳定性。

papers.title: Measuring Reward-Seeking via Contrastive Belief Updates

summary.en: Measures reward-seeking behavior in RL-trained LMs using contrastive belief updates to detect misalignment with developer intent.
summary.zh: 使用对比式信念更新测量RL训练的语言模型中的奖励寻求行为，以检测与开发者意图的不对齐。

papers.title: Reasoning Error from Known Fact: Step-Level Self-Consistency Group Relative Policy Optimization for LLM

summary.en: Step-level self-consistency reward modeling with group relative policy optimization to mitigate factual hallucinations in LLM reasoning.
summary.zh: 基于步级自洽性的组相对策略优化，通过可验证奖励缓解LLM推理中的事实幻觉。

papers.title: Find Before You Fine-Tune: A Diagnostic Study of Small LLMs for Cybersecurity QA

summary.en: Diagnostic framework to evaluate small LLMs before fine-tuning, identifying which models suit cybersecurity QA and predicting fine-tuning effects.
summary.zh: 诊断框架用于评估小型语言模型的微调适配性，预测微调对网络安全问答任务的影响。

papers.title: Copy Less, Ground More: Overcoming Repetitive Copying in Long-Context Reasoning via Evidence-Aware Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Proposes GEAR, a reward shaping method using grounding signals to reduce repetitive copying in long-context reasoning via RL.
summary.zh: 提出GEAR奖励塑形方法，通过接地信号在强化学习中减少长文本推理中的重复复制问题。

papers.title: Mark, Don't Erase: Token Inoculation for Dual-Use Knowledge in LLMs

summary.en: Token Inoculation enables selective refusal of hazardous knowledge through conditional gating during pre-training and SFT, balancing safety and utility.
summary.zh: Token Inoculation通过预训练和SFT中的条件门控实现有害知识的选择性拒绝，平衡安全性和实用性。

papers.title: CUSUM-Shaped Inference-Time Monitoring and Targeted Re-Decoding for Quantized Small Language Model Reasoning

summary.en: Inference-time monitoring with CUSUM-shaped detection and targeted re-decoding to correct degenerate trajectories in quantized small reasoning models.
summary.zh: 使用CUSUM形状检测和目标重新解码的推理时监控，以纠正量化小型推理模型中的退化轨迹。

papers.title: EvoThink: Evolving Thinking in Large Reasoning Models via Self-Pruning and Aha-Moment Preference Optimization

summary.en: Reduces reasoning redundancy via self-pruning and optimizes reasoning paths using aha-moment preference learning inspired by genetic algorithms.
summary.zh: 通过自剪枝减少推理冗余，并使用灵感来自遗传算法的顿悟时刻偏好学习优化推理路径。

papers.title: Rewarding Better Thinking for LLM Preference Alignment

summary.en: Process-oriented reward model using thinking checklists and EMA residuals for trajectory-level guidance in RL preference alignment.
summary.zh: 使用思维检查清单和EMA残差的过程导向奖励模型，为RL偏好对齐提供轨迹级指导。

papers.title: When Reasoning Narrows the Move: Diversity Collapse in LLM Game Play

summary.en: Shows SFT causes diversity collapse in game-playing; proposes action augmentation to preserve exploratory behavior during fine-tuning.
summary.zh: 揭示有监督微调导致游戏智能体的行为多样性崩溃；提出行为增强方法在微调中保留探索能力。

papers.title: Beyond Euclidean Clipping: Overcoming Exploration Collapse in LLM RL via Riemannian Isometric Policy Optimization

summary.en: Proposes RIPO, a Riemannian geometry-based policy optimization method that corrects PPO-Clip's exploration collapse by using isometric updates on the policy manifold.
summary.zh: 提出RIPO，一种基于黎曼几何的策略优化方法，通过在策略流形上使用等距更新来纠正PPO-Clip的探索崩溃问题。

papers.title: SLPO: Scaling Latent Reasoning via a Surrogate Policy

summary.en: Applies outcome-reward RL to latent reasoning via surrogate policy density and supervised stopping head for efficient test-time scaling.
summary.zh: 通过替代策略密度和监督停止头将结果奖励强化学习应用于潜在推理，实现高效的测试时扩展。

papers.title: PoTRE: Test-Time Reasoning inspired by Cognitive Heterogeneity

summary.en: Heterogeneous ensemble framework with four specialized agents and adaptive aggregation for improved test-time reasoning on complex tasks.
summary.zh: 采用四个专化代理和自适应聚合的异构集成框架，用于改进复杂任务的测试时推理。

papers.title: Knowledge-Centric Self-Improvement

summary.en: Knowledge-centric self-improvement via curated knowledge bases and distillation enables transferable agent improvements across tasks and LLM families.
summary.zh: 通过策划知识库和蒸馏实现以知识为中心的自我改进，使智能体改进可跨任务和LLM族群转移。

papers.title: PyroDash: Cost-Efficient Token-Level Small-Large Language Model Collaborative Inference

summary.en: SLM learns token-level handoff policy to collaborate with frozen LLM, reducing inference cost while maintaining reasoning performance.
summary.zh: SLM学习token级别的切换策略与冻结LLM协作，在保持推理性能的同时降低推理成本。

papers.title: Audio-Zero: Label-Free Self-Evolution for Fine-Grained Audio Reasoning

summary.en: Label-free self-play framework using verifiable rewards from audio contrast pairs to improve fine-grained audio reasoning in LALMs.
summary.zh: 使用音频对比对的可验证奖励的无标签自对弈框架，改进大型音频语言模型的细粒度音频推理。

papers.title: When Does Knowledge Distillation Hurt? Reliability-Aware Distillation for Low-Resource Language Summarization

summary.en: Proposes reliability-aware distillation methods that identify and filter harmful training samples, substantially improving knowledge distillation for low-resource language summarization.
summary.zh: 提出可靠性感知蒸馏方法，识别并过滤有害样本，显著改进低资源语言摘要的知识蒸馏效果。

papers.title: MOF-Sleuth: Tool-Grounded Reward Alignment for Explainable Fine-Grained MOF CIF Auditing

summary.en: RL-guided agent for MOF validation using tool-grounded rewards to align explanations with chemical evidence.
summary.zh: 使用工具驱动的奖励对齐解释与化学证据的MOF验证RL引导代理。

papers.title: Scaling Laws for Hypernetwork-Based Knowledge Injection in Large Language Models

summary.en: Studies scaling laws for hypernetwork-based train-time knowledge injection via LoRA adapters, demonstrating reliable OOD generalization.
summary.zh: 研究基于超网络的训练时知识注入缩放律，通过LoRA适配器实现可靠的域外泛化。

papers.title: SLAI T-Rex: Full-Parameter Post-training of the DeepSeek-V4 Family on Ascend SuperPOD

summary.en: Full-parameter post-training optimization framework for trillion-parameter MoE models on Ascend NPU with domain-specialized SFT for OR tasks.
summary.zh: 针对万亿参数MoE模型在昇腾NPU上的全参数后训练优化框架，包含运筹学任务的领域专用SFT。

papers.title: PRO-LONG: Programmatic Memory Enables Long-Horizon Reasoning

summary.en: Programmatic memory framework for LLM agents enabling efficient long-horizon reasoning via structured interaction logs and code-based search.
summary.zh: 为LLM代理提供程序化记忆框架，通过结构化交互日志和代码搜索实现高效的长视野推理。

papers.title: The Blessing of Dimensionality: How Near-Orthogonality in High-Dimensional Spaces Explains Temporal Portability

summary.en: Analyzes long-term temporal portability of LoRA patches across continual pretraining updates, explaining effectiveness through high-dimensional near-orthogonality.
summary.zh: 分析LoRA补丁在持续预训练中的长期时间可迁移性，通过高维近正交性解释其有效性。

papers.title: Statistical Inference for Rank Allocation in Low-Rank Adaptation

summary.en: StatLoRA allocates LoRA rank via statistical hypothesis testing, achieving comparable or better performance than adaptive rank baselines.
summary.zh: StatLoRA通过统计假设检验分配LoRA秩，性能与自适应秩基线相当或更优。

papers.title: Co-Evolving LLM Evaluators and Policies via DynamicRubric

summary.en: Co-evolving evaluators and policies via dynamic, response-set-conditioned rubrics to maintain discriminative reward signals during policy optimization.
summary.zh: 通过动态、响应集合条件的评分标准协同演进评估器和策略，在策略优化中保持判别性奖励信号。

papers.title: Efficient Chain-of-Modality Reasoning via Progressive Compression for Spoken Language Models

summary.en: Framework for efficient chain-of-thought reasoning in spoken language models via progressive compression of textual reasoning representations.
summary.zh: 通过渐进式压缩文本推理表示，为语音语言模型实现高效思维链推理的框架。

papers.title: Reference-Free Evaluation of Reasoning in Open-Ended Question Answering

summary.en: Reference-free evaluation framework using NLI and hypergraph search to audit reasoning traces in LLM outputs without gold references.
summary.zh: 使用NLI和超图搜索的无参考评估框架，用于审计LLM推理轨迹而无需黄金标准答案。

papers.title: Task Competence Is Not Instruction Following: Evaluating Instruction-Conflicting Behavior in Small Language Models

summary.en: Reveals that instruction tuning improves task accuracy but doesn't reliably teach models to follow conflicting instructions, especially in smaller models.
summary.zh: 揭示指令微调提高了任务准确性，但未能可靠地教会模型遵循冲突指令，尤其是在较小模型中。

papers.title: X$^3$-OPD: Distilling Reasoning into Large Audio-Language Models via On-Policy Alignment

summary.en: On-policy distillation framework transferring reasoning from text teacher to audio-language student via token-level guidance and cross-modal alignment.
summary.zh: 通过令牌级指导和跨模态对齐，将文本教师的推理能力蒸馏到音频语言学生的在线策略框架。

papers.title: Rushes: A Human Preference Dataset for Pluralistic Alignment

summary.en: Rushes dataset for evaluating pluralistic alignment through user engagement in interactive narratives, revealing LLM limitations in personalized preference modeling.
summary.zh: Rushes数据集用于评估交互式叙事中的多元化对齐，揭示大语言模型在个性化偏好建模中的局限性。

papers.title: REFACT: Adaptive Fact Restatement for Compact and Faithful Chain-of-Thought Reasoning

summary.en: Trains models to adaptively restate facts in reasoning traces, optimizing citation utility and answer sufficiency via SFT-to-RL pipeline.
summary.zh: 通过SFT-to-RL流程训练模型自适应地在推理轨迹中改述事实，优化引文效用和答案充分性。

papers.title: Visual Contrastive Self-Distillation

summary.en: On-policy self-distillation for vision-language models using visual contrastive signals without external teachers or privileged information.
summary.zh: 使用视觉对比信号的视觉语言模型在策略自蒸馏方法，无需外部教师或特殊信息。

papers.title: Token Budget Saturation and Mechanistic Early Detection of Reasoning Non-Convergence in Chain-of-Thought Models

summary.en: Detects reasoning convergence failure early in chain-of-thought generation using linear probes on hidden-state activations for adaptive compute allocation.
summary.zh: 通过隐层激活的线性探针在思维链生成早期检测推理收敛失败，用于自适应计算分配。

papers.title: How Many Bits Can an Adapter Write? Measuring the Capacity and Memorization of Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning

summary.en: Measures LoRA adapter capacity in bits, revealing storage depends on layer placement and showing differential privacy leakage between SFT and RL.
summary.zh: 以比特为单位测量LoRA适配器容量，揭示存储取决于层位置，并显示SFT和RL之间的差异化隐私泄露。

papers.title: Trace: A Taxonomy-Guided Environment for Multidomain Visual Reasoning

summary.en: Trace: a taxonomy-guided environment with 1,000 verifiable visual reasoning tasks enabling RLVR training for vision-language models.
summary.zh: Trace：包含1000个可验证视觉推理任务的分类法指导环境，支持视觉语言模型的RLVR训练。

papers.title: Beyond Sycophancy: Structured Resistance and Compliance in LLM Moral Reasoning

summary.en: Studies how LLMs balance accepting external input with maintaining principled moral judgments, framing sycophancy within social influence dynamics.
summary.zh: 研究大语言模型如何在接受外部意见与坚持原则性道德判断之间取得平衡，将谄媚置于社会影响动力学框架内。

papers.title: Test-Time Scaling via Error Localization
