summary.en: Inference-time algorithm using error localization and token-level credit assignment to improve test-time scaling efficiency in reasoning tasks.
summary.zh: 推理时错误定位算法，通过token级信用分配提高测试时间缩放效率。

papers.title: OPOD: On-Policy Omni Distillation

summary.en: On-policy distillation with modality-specific teacher routing to improve multimodal student models while maintaining cross-modal balance.
summary.zh: 通过模态特定教师路由的在线蒸馏方法改进多模态学生模型，同时保持跨模态平衡。

papers.title: CSPF: A Constrained Shared-Private Fusion Method for Non-Verifiable Preference Evaluation

summary.en: Fuses frozen reward models via shared-private decomposition to better evaluate non-verifiable tasks under human preferences.
summary.zh: 通过共享-私有分解融合冻结奖励模型，改进非可验证任务的人类偏好评估。

papers.title: MIRROR: Learning from the Other View for Multi-Modal Reasoning

summary.en: RL approach for multimodal reasoning that uses model predictions across different views as self-supervision signals to improve consistency.
summary.zh: 使用跨不同视图的模型预测作为自监督信号的强化学习方法，以改进多模态推理一致性。

papers.title: Artificial Epanorthosis: Why large language models overuse a classical rhetorical figure, and how to mitigate it

summary.en: Analyzes epanorthosis overuse in LLMs caused by training distribution and RLHF; proposes LoRA and SFT mitigation strategies.
summary.zh: 分析LLM中由训练数据分布和RLHF引起的修正法过度使用；提出LoRA和SFT缓解策略。

papers.title: Emergent Misalignment Recruits a Pre-existing Persona Subspace

summary.en: Identifies pre-existing persona subspaces in aligned models that enable emergent misalignment during narrow fine-tuning, enabling targeted intervention.
summary.zh: 识别对齐模型中预存的人格子空间，该子空间在窄域微调中导致新生对齐失败，支持有针对性干预。

papers.title: A Unified Moral-Value Dataset for Instruction Tuning

summary.en: Constructs a unified moral-value dataset for instruction tuning by merging existing moral datasets and converting them to instruction-response format.
summary.zh: 通过合并现有道德数据集并转换为指令-响应格式，为指令微调构建统一的道德价值数据集。

papers.title: The Dark Room in the Reward Channel: Dense Prediction Rewards Collapse GRPO-Trained LLM Agents -- and What Actually Works

summary.en: Identifies how dense prediction rewards cause policy collapse in GRPO-trained LLMs and proposes variance-profile criteria for safe reward design.
summary.zh: 识别密集预测奖励如何导致GRPO训练的LLM策略崩溃，并提出安全奖励设计的方差特征标准。

papers.title: The Weight of Silence: A Causal Case for Weights Over the Scratchpad in Latent Chess Reasoning

summary.en: Causal analysis of latent reasoning in chess shows RL increases robustness to perturbations rather than reliance on thought vectors.
summary.zh: 对国际象棋中潜在推理的因果分析表明，强化学习增强了对扰动的鲁棒性，而非对思维向量的依赖。

papers.title: Chemical Chain-of-Thought Functions as a Hallucination-Prone Molecular Scratchpad

summary.en: Analyzes how chemical reasoning models use chain-of-thought as a hallucination-prone scratchpad, revealing structural drafts drive generation despite inaccurate verbal claims.
summary.zh: 分析化学推理模型如何将链式思维用作易产生幻觉的草稿纸，揭示结构草稿驱动生成尽管口头声明不准确。

papers.title: PATS: Policy-Aware Training Scaffolding for Agentic Reinforcement Learning

summary.en: Policy-centric training framework using dynamic skill scaffolding to improve weak policy exploration and sample efficiency in agentic RL.
summary.zh: 使用动态技能脚手架改进弱策略探索和样本效率的策略中心训练框架。

papers.title: From Evaluation to Optimisation: Hierarchy-Aware Training Signals for CWE Prediction in Python

summary.en: Uses GRPO with hierarchical penalty rewards for CWE vulnerability prediction, outperforming supervised fine-tuning under distribution shift.
summary.zh: 使用GRPO和分层惩罚奖励进行CWE漏洞预测，在分布偏移下超越监督微调。

papers.title: Sample-Efficient Learning from Agent Experience

summary.en: Distills in-context learning from agent experience into model weights without additional environment interaction, retaining 64.8% of ICL gains.
summary.zh: 将智能体经验中的上下文学习蒸馏到模型权重中，无需额外环境交互，保留64.8%的ICL收益。

papers.title: EmoAgent-R1: Towards Multimodal Emotion Understanding with Reinforcement Learning-based Dynamic Agent Specialization

summary.en: RL-based dynamic agent framework for multimodal emotion recognition with Progressive Group-Relative Policy Optimization.
summary.zh: 基于强化学习的动态智能体框架用于多模态情感识别，采用渐进式组相对策略优化。

papers.title: Multi-turn RL with Structural and Performance Aware Rewards for CUDA Kernel Generation

summary.en: RL framework combining verifiable execution and structural code rewards for optimized CUDA kernel generation via offline ranking and online policy optimization.
summary.zh: 结合可验证执行奖励和结构代码奖励的RL框架，通过离线排序和在线策略优化生成优化的CUDA核函数。
